performanceFindings.description: re.compile() was called per-candidate in tight rglob loop — hoisted outside loop (fixed in review)

patternCompliance.note: auto_expanded_paths defaults to [] on all TaskDescV2

principleNotes.note: Self-expansion overwrite bug found and fixed during review. All verify commands pass.
No OWASP issues. File reads use errors='replace'. No user-controlled regex injection (patterns from repo config only).
PLAN.json tasks match changes. SUMMARY.json artifacts correct. Workers never close issues. Phase progression coherent.
Regex compilation hoisted outside candidate loop. rglob bounded by _SKIP_DIRS. Acceptable for plan-time (not hot-path).
Clean separation: config in WORKFLOW.json, scanner standalone, expansion in post-pass, rendering in prompt generator.
No unit tests for scan_deletion_callers or cascade expansion. Verified via py_compile + workflow_validate only.
+158 LOC across 4 files. No drive-by refactors. Changes match plan goals exactly.

warnings: No unit tests for new functions — consider adding in follow-up
leaderFixups: Fixed self-expansion overwrite bug (line 159: guard with target_idx != j)
Hoisted re.compile() outside candidate loop for performance
